summary: See clues file for full details. 5 tossups, 6 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 5 tossups and 6 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: This artist's trips were often financed by Cyrus Field.
examples: This artist's trips were often financed by Cyrus Field.

clues.clue: A painting by this artist featured flora from five different bio-regions he referenced from the Naturgemalde [na-TOOR-ge-mel-duh] map.
examples: A painting by this artist featured flora from five different bio-regions he referenced from the Naturgemalde [na-TOOR-ge-mel-duh] map.

clues.clue: A cross of sunlight dominates the center-right of this artist's El Rio de Luz.
examples: A cross of sunlight dominates the center-right of this artist's El Rio de Luz.

clues.clue: A dirt path at the bottom-left of a work by this artist leads to two men stopping by a wooden cross.
examples: A dirt path at the bottom-left of a work by this artist leads to two men stopping by a wooden cross.

clues.clue: At this artist's mansion Olana, he created a painting which shows a ruined mausoleum through a cracked rock.
examples: At this artist's mansion Olana, he created a painting which shows a ruined mausoleum through a cracked rock.

clues.clue: This artist of (*) El Khasne, Petra was inspired to paint one region after reading Alexander von Humboldt's Kosmos.
examples: This artist of (*) El Khasne, Petra was inspired to paint one region after reading Alexander von Humboldt's Kosmos.

clues.clue: Using sketches from a trip to Ecuador, this artist painted a sunrise obscured by smoke spewing from the Cotopaxi volcano.
examples: Using sketches from a trip to Ecuador, this artist painted a sunrise obscured by smoke spewing from the Cotopaxi volcano.

clues.clue: This artist designed and created a large "picturesque" landscape that was best observed from the "Viewshed" near the Calvert Vaux (VAWKS)-designed "Cosy Cottage," where this man painted many of his works.
examples: This artist designed and created a large "picturesque" landscape that was best observed from the "Viewshed" near the Calvert Vaux (VAWKS)-designed "Cosy Cottage," where this man painted many of his works.

clues.clue: This artist's travels in Persia inspired both a painting that looks through an opening in a rock onto the facade of a building known as "the treasury" and the name of his family home, Olana.
examples: This artist's travels in Persia inspired both a painting that looks through an opening in a rock onto the facade of a building known as "the treasury" and the name of his family home, Olana.

clues.clue: This artist of El Khasne Petra was inspired by Alexander von Humboldt's book Cosmos to take a trip that inspired a massive landscape depicting two people in front of a rustic cross to the left of a large tropical waterfall.
examples: This artist of El Khasne Petra was inspired by Alexander von Humboldt's book Cosmos to take a trip that inspired a massive landscape depicting two people in front of a rustic cross to the left of a large tropical waterfall.

clues.clue: A painting by this artist premiered at an exhibition at which more than twelve thousand people were provided with opera glasses to view it in a darkened room.
examples: A painting by this artist premiered at an exhibition at which more than twelve thousand people were provided with opera glasses to view it in a darkened room.

clues.clue: The sitting room of this artist's mansion Olana is decorated with a painting of his that depicts ruins through the narrow Siq, El Khasne Petra, which was done on a trip which also produced a painting of The Parthenon.
examples: The sitting room of this artist's mansion Olana is decorated with a painting of his that depicts ruins through the narrow Siq, El Khasne Petra, which was done on a trip which also produced a painting of The Parthenon.
